entry.title: New: CR 25-16 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 25-21, CD1, to authorize the acquisition of 1.811 acres of real property identified as a portion of tax map key (2) 2-3-005:004; a waterline easement across tax map keys (2) 2-3-004:016, (2) 2-3-004:020, and (2) 2-3-005:004, and an access easement across tax map keys (2) 2-3-004:016 and (2) 2-3-005:004, ‘Ōma‘opio, Kula, Makawao, Maui, Hawai‘i for $451,561.

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
